title: woodsia pallida
intro: Woodsia pallida, also known as the pale cliff fern, is a species of fern in the family Woodsiaceae. It is a small, delicate plant with lacy fronds that typically grows in shaded, rocky areas. The medicinal properties of Woodsia pallida include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and promoting wound healing.
